warnings.apiKeyRequired: API key (GEMINI_API_KEY) not set — enter it in Settings
warnings.profileRecommended: Profile is empty — fill it in Settings to improve AI analysis

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Describe yourself to improve AI analysis accuracy. Add your name, occupation, personality, hobbies, etc.

llm.title: LLM
llm.recommendedHint: Recommended: Claude Code or Codex CLI for local analysis. Gemini API keys remain available.
llm.externalHint: External mode is for advanced integrations. vida will not analyze frames locally and instead waits for a separate WebSocket client to send frame analysis and summaries.

capture.title: Capture
capture.audioHint: Linux: ALSA device (e.g. plughw:1,0) | Mac/Windows: device name

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.hint: Leave blank to keep the current value.

welcome.title: Welcome to vida
welcome.description: Your personal AI system for monitoring, managing, and analyzing your daily life.

profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.description: The more detail you provide, the more accurate your recordings will be!
profile.hint: Name, occupation, personality, hobbies, workspace, people around you — you can always edit this later in Settings

setup.title: Quick Setup
setup.description: Recommended: sign in to Claude Code or Codex CLI for local analysis. Gemini API keys are still supported if you prefer hosted models.
setup.geminiApiKeyHint: A Gemini API key is required for Gemini provider validation.
setup.geminiApiKeyHintExisting: A saved Gemini API key already exists. Leave this blank to reuse it.

status.external: External mode is ready. Connect a WebSocket client after onboarding.
status.missingApiKey: Enter a Gemini API key to continue.
status.missingBinary: {{provider}} is not installed on this machine.
status.binaryFoundButFailed: {{provider}} was found, but the validation request failed. Rate limits, login state, or a temporary error may be the cause.
status.pythonNotFound: Python is not available yet. Run `uv sync` first.
status.checkerNotFound: The provider validation helper is missing.
status.requestFailed: {{provider}} did not complete the validation check.

start.title: You're all set!
start.description: Start the daemon to begin capturing. Run the command below or launch via Electron.

ragChat.title: AI Chat
ragChat.placeholder: Ask questions about your recorded data
ragChat.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
ragChat.suggestion2: What do I do most often?

data.title: Data
data.exportHint: Export all data as CSV or JSON.
data.importHint: Import CSV data from another device. Duplicate records are skipped.

demo.onboardingReadonly: Demo Mode — Profile editing is disabled.
demo.simulatedBanner: This is a simulated demo — data is generated, not real.
